content:
[Intro]

[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]
Have you ever met a girl that you tried to date[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Dm[/ch]
But a year to make love she wanted you to wait[/tab]
Let me tell ya a story of my situation

I was talking to this girl from the U.S. nation[/tab]


[Verse 1]

[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]
The way that I met her was on tour at a concert[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Dm[/ch]

I just got onstage dripping, pouring with sweat
[tab]                                    [ch]G[/ch]

[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]
I whispered in her ear, come to the picture booth[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Dm[/ch]
So I can ask you some questions to see if you are a hundred proof[/tab]
I asked her her name, she said blah-blah-blah
[tab]                          [ch]G[/ch]
She had 9/10 pants and a very big bra[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]
I took a couple of flicks and she was enthused[/tab]

I said, how do you like the show?[/tab]
She said, I was very amused
I started throwing bass, she started throwing back mid-range

But when I sprung the question, she acted kind of strange[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Then when I asked, do ya have a man, she tried to pretend[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Dm[/ch]
She said, no I don't, I only have a friend[/tab]
Come on, I'm not even goin' for it,
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]
This is what I'm goin sing[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]Dm[/ch]

[tab]                        [ch]G[/ch]

[tab]                        [ch]G[/ch]
But you say he's just a friend, oh baby[/tab]

[tab]                         [ch]G[/ch]

[Verse 2]

[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]
So I took blah-blahs word for it at this time[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Dm[/ch]
I thought just havin a friend couldn't be no crime[/tab]
cause I have friends and that's a fact
[tab]                        [ch]G[/ch]
Like Agnes, Agatha, Germaine, and Jack[/tab]

Forget about that, let's go into the story[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Dm[/ch]
About a girl named blah-blah-blah that adored me[/tab]

[tab]                          [ch]G[/ch]
Spending a lot of time so we can build a[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]
Relationship or some understanding[/tab]

How it's gonna be in the future we was planning[/tab]
Everything sounded so dandy and sweet
[tab]                     [ch]G[/ch]
I had no idea I was in for a treat[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]
After this was established, everything was cool[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Dm[/ch]
The tour was over and she went back to school[/tab]
I called every day to see how she was doin'

[tab]        [ch]Dm[/ch]
I said, yo, who was that? oh, he's just a friend[/tab]
Don't gimme that, don't even gimme that

  Just bust this[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]Dm[/ch]

[Verse 2]

[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]
So I came to her college on a surprise visit[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Dm[/ch]
To see my girl that was so exquisite[/tab]
It was a school day, I knew she was there
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]
The first semester of the school year[/tab]

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
Yo, could you tell me where is door three?[/tab]

[tab]                            [ch]G[/ch]

[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]
So I came to her room and opened the door[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
